name: Berena (Klingon Gingerbread)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, cream together the margarine and sugar until smooth.
3. Beat in the egg.
4. Stir in the molasses, boiling water, ginger, cinnamon, cloves, salt, baking powder, and baking soda.
5. Gradually stir in the flour until all ingredients are well combined.
6. Pour the batter into a greased baking pan.
7. Bake for 30-35 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Allow to cool completely before removing from the pan.
